text:
Sure, here's a short story:

Eileen, a high school librarian, was closing up the library one afternoon when she noticed Kevin looking through the science fiction section.

"Hey Kevin," she smiled. "That book in your hand, the one with the big black cover? It's about aliens."

Kevin nodded, almost ashamed to admit he'd found the book hidden behind a pile of popular novels. Eileen smiled warmly and pulled out a card to check it out.

"Alright, just borrow it. After all, it's all about exploring other worlds and the adventures that come with them."

Kevin took the book, a little nervous but intrigued. She handed it back to him the following week, when he returned with a list of questions.

"This one's pretty unique," Kevin said, flipping through the pages. "Have other people made contact with aliens?"

Eileen chuckled. "You mean like in science fiction?"

"Yeah!" Kevin laughed. "No, this isn't that kind of book
